user.title: Connect to myAudi
user.description: Select your region and optionally enter your S-PIN for remote lock/unlock.

data_description.spin: Required for remote lock/unlock. Leave empty if not needed.

callback.title: Authenticate with myAudi
callback.description:
1. Open the link below in your browser:

[Log in to myAudi]({authorize_url})

2. Log in with your myAudi credentials.
3. After login, your browser will try to open a `myaudi:///` link and show an error — this is expected.
4. Copy the **full URL** from your browser's address bar and paste it below.

data_description.redirect_url: Paste the full URL starting with myaudi:/// from your browser.

vin.title: Enter your Vehicle Identification Number
vin.description: We could not automatically discover your vehicles. Please enter your VIN manually. You can find it in the myAudi app or on your vehicle registration.

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. The authorization code may have expired — try again.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to myAudi servers. Please try again later.
error.no_code: Could not find an authorization code in the URL. Make sure you copied the full redirect URL.
error.invalid_vin: Invalid VIN. It must be exactly 17 characters.
